---
title: "test_set_persona_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_set_persona_empire.py"
loc: 43
complexity: 2
logic_score: 6.65
style_score: 3.63
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.33
---

## Intent
The `test_set_persona_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestSetPersonaEmpire, test_extract_persona, test_save_persona, test_switch_interactive_cancel, test_switch_direct. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestSetPersonaEmpire, test_extract_persona, test_save_persona, test_switch_interactive_cancel, test_switch_direct. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.set_persona](file://src.core.set_persona)

### Exports
- `TestSetPersonaEmpire`
- `test_extract_persona`
- `test_save_persona`
- `test_switch_interactive_cancel`
- `test_switch_direct`
